title: Expose buildah --compression-level on push command
body:
### Feature request description

`buildah push` provides a [--compression-level](https://www.mankier.com/1/buildah-push#--compression-level) argument which is however not exposed on `podman`. It would be great to let this parameter bubble out in podman's CLI, similarly to `--compression-format`

### Suggest potential solution

_No response_

### Have you considered any alternatives?

The alternative would be to use buildah directly.

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: opened a PR to expose the option: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18940
